name: Louise M. Davies Symphony Hall
summary_en: Archived materials center on the Louise M. Davies Symphony Hall's place in the Civic Center performing-arts complex: a War Memorial Board of Trustees annual report noting the hall opened September 16, 1980, a 1994 Civic Center cultural facilities plan, a 1986 East/West notice of a concert held there, and multiple San Francisco Performing Arts Center calendars of events (2000-2012) listing its programming. The hall is operated by the War Memorial (WAR) department, which carried an FY2025 budget of $30M. The place file records no contracts naming it.
